sentences.target: Ich habe meinen Mantel im Bus vergessen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈmaɪnən ˈmantl̩ ɪm bʊs fɛɐ̯ˈgɛsən/

translations.de: Ich habe meinen Mantel im Bus vergessen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈmaɪnən ˈmantl̩ ɪm bʊs fɛɐ̯ˈgɛsən/
translations.en: I forgot my coat on the bus.
translations.es: Olvidé mi abrigo en el autobús.
translations.fr: J’ai oublié mon manteau dans le bus.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把大衣忘在公交车上了。
translations.yue: 我喺巴士度遺低咗件褸。
translations.ru: Я забыл своё пальто в автобусе.
translations.vi: Tôi quên áo khoác trên xe buýt.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn jas in de bus vergeten.
translations.uk: Я забув своє пальто в автобусі.
translations.hi: मैं अपना कोट बस में भूल गया।
translations.el: Ξέχασα το παλτό μου στο λεωφορείο.
translations.sv: Jag glömde min rock på bussen.
translations.da: Jeg glemte min frakke i bussen.
translations.ja: バスにコートを置き忘れた。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (present, 1st sg) forming the Perfekt with the past participle 'vergessen'.
Possessive determiner, masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Mantel'.
Masculine noun, accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'vergessen'.
Preposition (fusion of 'in' + 'dem'), governs dative; introduces locative PP 'im Bus'.
Noun, dative singular; object of 'im'; head of locative PP modifying the verb.
Past participle; main lexical verb in Perfekt construction with 'habe'.

sentences.target: Der Mantel ist noch im Schrank.

translations.de: Der Mantel ist noch im Schrank.
translations.en: The coat is still in the closet.
translations.es: El abrigo aún está en el armario.
translations.fr: Le manteau est encore dans le placard.
translations.pt: O casaco ainda está no armário.
translations.vi: Áo khoác vẫn còn trong tủ áo.
translations.nl: De jas hangt nog in de kast.
translations.hu: A kabát még a szekrényben van.
translations.hi: कोट अभी भी अलमारी में है।
translations.el: Το παλτό είναι ακόμα στη ντουλάπα.
translations.ja: コートはまだクローゼットの中にある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Mantel'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Finite copular auxiliary (present, 3rd sg); links subject to the predicative PP.
Temporal adverb indicating continuity; modifies the predicate/clause.
Preposition (fusion of 'in' + 'dem'), governs dative; introduces predicative PP.
Noun, dative singular; object of 'im'; head of PP functioning as predicate complement.

sentences.target: Er legt den Mantel aufs Bett.

translations.de: Er legt den Mantel aufs Bett.
translations.en: He puts the coat on the bed.
translations.es: Él deja el abrigo sobre la cama.
translations.fr: Il pose le manteau sur le lit.
translations.it: Lui mette il cappotto sul letto.
translations.pt: Ele coloca o casaco na cama.
translations.he: הוא שם את המעיל על המיטה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đặt áo khoác lên giường.
translations.nl: Hij legt de jas op het bed.
translations.hi: वह कोट बिस्तर पर रखता है।
translations.el: Βάζει το παλτό πάνω στο κρεβάτι.
translations.id: Dia menaruh mantel di atas ranjang.
translations.ja: 彼はコートをベッドの上に置く。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd sg); transitive; takes DO 'den Mantel' and directional PP 'aufs Bett'.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Mantel'.
Masculine noun, accusative singular; direct object.
Preposition (fusion of 'auf' + 'das'), governs accusative; introduces directional PP.
Noun, accusative singular; object of 'aufs'; head of PP expressing goal location.

sentences.target: Sie kauft einen warmen Mantel im Winter.
sentences.reading: /ziː kaʊft ˈaɪnən ˈvaʁmən ˈmantl̩ ɪm ˈvɪntɐ/

translations.de: Sie kauft einen warmen Mantel im Winter.
translations.ipa: /ziː kaʊft ˈaɪnən ˈvaʁmən ˈmantl̩ ɪm ˈvɪntɐ/
translations.en: She is buying a warm coat in winter.
translations.es: Ella está comprando un abrigo grueso en invierno.
translations.fr: Elle achète un manteau chaud en hiver.
translations.it: Lei sta comprando un cappotto caldo in inverno.
translations.zh-Hans: 她正在买一件暖和的大衣。
translations.pt: Ela está comprando um casaco quente no inverno.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang mua một chiếc áo khoác ấm vào mùa đông.
translations.ar: هي تشتري معطفًا دافئًا في الشتاء.
translations.nl: Ze koopt in de winter een warme jas.
translations.hi: वह सर्दियों में एक गर्म कोट खरीद रही है।
translations.el: Αυτή αγοράζει ένα ζεστό παλτό τον χειμώνα.
translations.nb: Hun kjøper en varm frakk om vinteren.
translations.id: Dia membeli mantel hangat saat musim dingin.
translations.sv: Hon köper en varm rock på vintern.
translations.ro: Ea cumpără un palton călduros iarna.
translations.da: Hun køber en varm frakke om vinteren.
translations.ja: 彼女は冬に暖かいコートを買う。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd sg); transitive; selects a direct object and temporal PP.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Mantel'.
Attributive adjective, masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Mantel'.
Masculine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'kauft'.
Preposition (fusion of 'in' + 'dem'), governs dative; introduces temporal PP.
Noun, dative singular; object of 'im'; head of PP functioning as temporal adverbial.
